Title: Abstract Circle Pie Chart Geometric Wall Art Print
Description:
Modern minimalist geometric wall art featuring an abstract pie chart design. This piece uses simple, complementary shapes—a muted terracotta, a cool slate blue, and a creamy beige background—to create a striking visual balance.

  • Elevate Your Decor: Perfect for adding a sophisticated, contemporary touch to living rooms, offices, bedrooms, or creative spaces.
  • Versatile Design: The abstract nature ensures it complements various interior styles, from mid-century modern to Scandinavian farmhouse.
  • High Quality Print: Printed on durable, matte archival paper, this artwork offers crisp lines and rich, muted tones that enhance any setting.
  • Ideal Gift: Makes a thoughtful and stylish housewarming gift or a unique piece for an art-lover's home.

The subtle colors and clean geometry provide a focal point without overwhelming the room, making it a perfect accent piece for modern interiors.
